case_title: JIN CHEN VS. FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-26-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,337.24 FILED BY CHEN, JIN AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIN AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-11-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JIN CHEN. DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JIN CHEN ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER AIDONG NI. DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITIES SERVICES DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETURNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-290) ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIN AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (TO CORRECTED AGENT OF SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, JIN AS TO DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO FEB-25-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT JIN CHEN REPRESENTED BY AIDONG NI. DEFENDANT FLAGSHIP FACILITY SERVICES, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KATHRINE CAOUETTE GENERAL COUNSEL. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-25 2019 HEARING IF NO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS MET. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING THE CASE IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PER AGREEMENT IN COURT. A COPIES OF THE PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS/COMPUTATIONS WERE GIVEN TO BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
